CustomField.description: Per-signal gate for Signal 3 (overdue invoices aged past WatcherARAgingMinDaysOverdueNumber__c, grouped by 1-7/8-14/15-30/30+ aging bands). When non-null AND master gate is non-null, WatcherARAgingQueryService runs on each digest tick. PR-B's install handler sets this on install for top-3 implemented signals.
CustomField.label: Enable Watcher AR Aging Signal
